scripts.build: bun run sdk:generate-metadata && bun run --filter @watwowmap/pogo-data build
scripts.typecheck: bun run sdk:generate-metadata && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && bun run --filter @watwowmap/pogo-data typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --filter @watwowmap/pogo-data test && bun run test:go && bun run test:rust
scripts.sdk:generate-metadata:check: bun run sdk:generate-metadata && git diff --exit-code -- packages/typescript/src/generated/metadata.ts packages/go/metadata.go packages/rust/src/metadata.rs
scripts.ci: bun run sdk:generate-metadata:check && bun run build && bun run typecheck && bun run test
